scenarios.title: Molecular ML, Drug Discovery, and Chemistry Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Cheminformatics, molecule processing, molecular property prediction, featurization, MoleculeNet, docking, molecular simulation, force fields, conformers, reactions, retrosynthesis, and chemistry model training.
scenarios.role: Use OpenMM for molecular simulation workflows, force-field/model preparation, custom forces/integrators, platform/performance diagnostics, and maintainer extension work.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `openmm` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: custom forces integrators, development extensions, force fields modeling, platforms performance, and simulation workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `openmm` when the request names `openmm`, centers on molecular simulation workflows, force-field/model preparation, custom forces/integrators, platform/performance diagnostics, and maintainer extension work, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in molecular ml drug discovery and chemistry workflows. Then route to custom forces integrators, development extensions, force fields modeling, or platforms performance when those focused workflows match.
